subcodes.first_line: The fragrance of divine utterance hath been wafted throughout all creation. Blessed is he who hath inhaled it and recognized Him Who hath come with manifest sovereignty. O peoples of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاحت نفحه البیان فی الامکان طوبی لمن وجدها و عرف من اتی بسلطان مبین یا ملاء الارض
subcodes.subjects: @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proclamation to the people of the world
